answers.where: Battle arena with the sourced Assault Walker hero moving and firing at drones on the stylized studs station floor.
answers.action: Move diagonally with WASD while the mech auto-fires at drones.
answers.response: The hero mech now leans relative to facing and shows stronger step, movement, and cannon attack cues.
answers.reward: The main mech feels more alive in combat without adding new mechanics.
answers.game_look: Bright Roblox-like toy mech battle with sourced hero, local motion lean, colored attack lines, stride rings, station props, readable controls, and clear battle HUD.

issues.text: Hero local lean, stride rings, motion trails, and muzzle streaks improve the combat read, but the mech still needs authored animation states and the battle framing can keep it more centered during diagonal movement.
